description: Professional medicine and healthcare career library covering major healthcare professions.

careers.name: Doctor (MBBS)
careers.overview: Doctor is a healthcare profession dedicated to improving patient health, diagnosis, treatment, prevention and medical care.
careers.whyChoose: Respected profession, strong societal impact, career stability and long-term growth opportunities.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology from a recognized board.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 PCB → NEET → Medical Degree/Specialized Program → Internship → Practice or Higher Studies.
careers.workEnvironment: Hospitals, clinics, research centers, healthcare organizations and public health institutions.
careers.futureScope: Strong global demand driven by aging populations, healthcare expansion and medical innovation.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support diagnosis and healthcare analytics but human expertise remains essential.

careers.name: Audiologist
careers.overview: Audiologists are healthcare professionals who diagnose, assess and treat hearing, balance and auditory disorders in patients of all age groups.
careers.whyChoose: A rewarding healthcare career with growing demand due to increasing awareness of hearing health and aging populations.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 with PCB. Bachelor's degree in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology (BASLP) or related program.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 PCB → BASLP → Internship → Clinical Practice or Higher Studies.
careers.workEnvironment: Hospitals, hearing clinics, rehabilitation centers, schools and private practice.
careers.futureScope: Strong demand due to increasing hearing-related disorders and elderly care requirements.
careers.aiImpact: AI-assisted hearing diagnostics and smart hearing aids will support audiologists.

careers.name: Speech Therapist
careers.overview: Speech Therapists diagnose and treat communication, speech, language and swallowing disorders.
careers.whyChoose: Provides the opportunity to significantly improve patients' quality of life.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 PCB. BASLP or Speech-Language Pathology degree.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 PCB → BASLP → Clinical Training → Practice.
careers.workEnvironment: Hospitals, rehabilitation centers, schools and private clinics.
careers.futureScope: Growing demand in healthcare and special education sectors.
careers.aiImpact: AI speech analysis tools will support diagnosis and therapy planning.

careers.name: Nutritionist

careers.name: Veterinarian
careers.overview: Veterinarians diagnose, treat and prevent diseases in animals and ensure animal welfare.
careers.whyChoose: Ideal for individuals passionate about animal health and welfare.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 PCB and NEET qualification.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 PCB → NEET → BVSc & AH → Practice or Specialization.
careers.workEnvironment: Animal hospitals, veterinary clinics, farms, zoos and research institutions.
careers.futureScope: Increasing demand due to pet care, livestock management and animal healthcare.
careers.aiImpact: AI-assisted diagnostics will improve veterinary care.

careers.name: Radiographer
careers.overview: Radiographer is a healthcare career focused on patient care, diagnosis, treatment, prevention and improving quality of life.
careers.whyChoose: Radiographer offers meaningful social impact, respected work, strong career stability and growing healthcare demand.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB).
careers.educationPath: Class 12 PCB -> Entrance exam or relevant degree -> Clinical training -> Practice or specialization.
careers.workEnvironment: Hospitals, clinics, diagnostic centers, rehabilitation centers, public health teams and research institutions.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to healthcare expansion, preventive care, medical technology and public health needs.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support diagnosis, reporting and analytics, while human judgement and patient interaction remain essential.

careers.name: Medical Laboratory Technologist
careers.overview: Medical Laboratory Technologists perform laboratory tests to assist doctors in diagnosis and treatment planning.
careers.whyChoose: Essential healthcare role with strong demand in hospitals and diagnostic centers.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 PCB → BMLT → Internship → Clinical Practice.
careers.workEnvironment: Hospitals, pathology labs, research centers and diagnostic laboratories.
careers.futureScope: Excellent due to growth in diagnostics and preventive healthcare.
careers.aiImpact: AI will automate testing processes but professionals remain critical for interpretation.

careers.name: Optometrist
careers.overview: Optometrists examine vision, diagnose eye problems and prescribe corrective lenses.
careers.whyChoose: Growing healthcare profession with increasing eye care awareness.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 PCB → Bachelor of Optometry → Internship → Practice.
careers.workEnvironment: Eye hospitals, clinics, optical chains and private practice.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to increasing vision-related disorders and screen usage.
careers.aiImpact: AI-assisted eye diagnostics will improve efficiency.

careers.name: Emergency Medical Technician
careers.overview: Emergency Medical Technicians provide immediate medical care and transportation during emergencies.
careers.whyChoose: Critical frontline healthcare role that saves lives.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 PCB preferred.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 → EMT Certification/Diploma → Clinical Training.
careers.workEnvironment: Ambulance services, hospitals, disaster response units and emergency departments.
careers.futureScope: Growing demand due to expanding emergency healthcare services.
careers.aiImpact: AI will assist emergency triage and patient monitoring.

careers.name: Clinical Research Associate
careers.overview: Clinical Research Associate works in a specialized professional pathway with applied knowledge, problem solving and industry-ready skills.
careers.whyChoose: Clinical Research Associate is useful because it offers focused career growth, practical skill building and opportunities across relevant organizations.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 or graduation requirements vary by institution and specialization.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> Relevant degree/diploma/certification -> Internship/projects -> Professional role.
careers.workEnvironment: Companies, institutions, agencies, startups, government bodies and specialist teams.
careers.futureScope: Strong for students who build practical skills, portfolios, internships and updated domain knowledge.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support routine work while judgement, communication and specialist expertise remain important.
cons: Early career may need portfolio or training
